sections.paragraph:
f. of the preceding.-

(1) rest, repose, condition of rest, Rth 1:9 (compare 3:2 Jer 45:3 Isa 28:12, זאֹת הַמְּנוּחָה “this is the rest,” this is the way to enjoy tranquil felicity. מֵי מְנוּחֹות still waters, Psa 23:2. Specially the quiet possession of the land of Canaan, Psa 95:11 [a far higher rest is here pointed out]; Deu 12:9.

(2) a place of rest, Num 10:33 Mic 2:10 hence a habitation, Isa 11:10.
